inputs.label: Area in perches
inputs.businessContext: Land area measurement in perches (1 perch = 25.29285264 m²)

inputs.label: Conversion factor (sqm per perch)
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor; can be overridden for historical variants

inputs.label: Verify reverse: known area in sqm
inputs.businessContext: Optional input to compute equivalent perches for validation

inputs.label: Offset adjustment (sqm)
inputs.businessContext: Calibration offset added to the result

inputs.label: Decimal precision for display
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding display (not used in raw calculation)
